item.title: "I'm in this photo and I don't like it" Mental health-ish things I've saved
item.description: One thing thats always stuck with me from my therapist, in regards to people pleasing: "Do you like every person you meet? If not, why are you trying to make everyone like you?"
item.dc:creator: DysfunctionalReptile

item.title: Tres exotiques!
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: Hexia is back!!!
item.description: I’m finally settled back in at home yippee! TLDR I moved home to save for a house and spend some time with family (I typically live down south in the UK, but moved back up north). Anyway here is Hexia! I wanted to have the art be veryy good so after scrapping a lot of drawings, this one came out great and I’m really happy! Extra nudie versions on my patreon! https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella www.patreon.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: Communities look out for each other
item.description: I like the music, but go ahead and mute, I'll never know. I bet each one looks forward to seeing each other.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: İt's crime spree and no one is doing anything against it!
item.description: Source - Reddit Found a must-read piece on today’s political scene. Seriously, take a minute to check it out: https://www.bbc.com@bbcnewspolicy.github.io/news-trendingnews-article-6732954-world-usa-canada-2025-politics-global-affairs-diplomacy-economy-la/ His son heads a $4bil Saudi investment fund. Musk dismantled government agencies that were investigating his companies. This is the most corrupt regime in US history by far. The flooded the zone and it works
item.dc:creator: PumNoodleWatcher

item.title: Copy fine dining.
item.dc:creator: AdventurousDonut480

item.title: Bruno's Scalp Surgery
item.description:
We found him dumped by the road when he was 7 weeks old. His scalp was all cut up at the time and the wounds would never heal properly, with constant recurring abscesses. We eventually had our vet perform surgery to clean everything up so it could all heal.
Very much having that "I Frankenstein" look. Looked pretty ruff.
Sleeping it off.
Our good boy today. Doing much better.
item.dc:creator: ElBurroGrande68

item.title: The guy who started a site to creep on women is lonely?
item.description: Unscheduled Edit: Hey Mark, you still sure about our AI best friends? Look what I found on the internet today: https://www.forbes.com/sites/emilybaker-white/2025/05/12/these-ai-tutors-for-kids-gave-fentanyl-recipes-and-dangerous-diet-advice/ Most viral edit: Thanks for the upvotes, my dudes! To clarify my original post, I am not a fan of AI, I make plenty of rant-y posts about AI fuckery. I’m hating on Zuck because he deserves it. He was a piece of shit in college who started Facebook to rank the hotness or the dating probability of women (I forget exact details, doesn’t matter it’s all gross) and he has made zero improvements to his character in almost 2 decades. I’ll listen to Zuck if he is announcing the shut down of Facebook or, his plans to return to his home planet now that his mission to fuck up Earth is nearly complete. Original post below: Source/ https://bsky.app/profile/nerdjpg.com/post/3loyukzzmbk2x Friends tend to share common values. You don’t have any values, you sold out friends and coworkers on your way to the top, you are exactly where you belong. Note: I’m not hating on AI in this post, this a Zuck hate focused post. He is stupid and so are his ideas.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: You Maniacs! You Blew It Up! Ah, Damn You! God Damn You All to Hell!
item.description: They broke the broke the New York Times Pitchbot! This is so egregiously horrible that it has exceeded the Pitchbot's ability to parody the "Gray lady." It is a complete mind f%$# that a person who has dedicated many minutes every day to satirizing self described, "All the news that's fit to print," has found that the actual behavior of a NY Times reporter beyond parody.
item.dc:creator: msaroff4

item.title: Can't wait for the honeymoon video.
item.dc:creator: BenntheNinja

item.title: Happy Meme Monday from The Litterbox! [OC]
item.description:
Hubby and I use the "Matthew McConaughey Smoking" reaction image a lot, so I thought it would be funny (and useful to us!) to have Litterbox versions!
I paired it up with the "It wasn't Chocolate" text from a few years back! Oh my goodness, I was out getting my wisdom teeth pulled at the time and I felt like the lucky one! (:
By Stratus on Litterbox Discord Join at https://litterbox.gg/
By riksoz on Litterbox Discord Join at https://litterbox.gg/
By YouCanCallMeKnuckles on Litterbox Discord Join at https://litterbox.gg/
BLANK #1
BLANK #2
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: Day 12 of mermay: Pineapple [OC]
item.description:
Here is day 12 with a pineapple mermaid! The fruit that bites back <3 despite this knowledge I never stop eating fresh pineapple until my mouth hurts :,D
Holy mackerel guys, we’re almost near the end of week two already?! Time flies when you’re having fun! Can’t wait to show you the fig mermaid tomorrow, I’m well chuffed with how she’s turning out ;D
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: Can I Remember All 300 of My Cosplays?
item.description: This was a super fun challenge, and is just a short section of my new video: Can I Remember All 300 of My Cosplays? Wanted to post this excerpt cause it has some listed I know are you favs here on Imgur :P Also, what is wrong with me? Too many cosplays... Which ones did I miss? More importantly, what should I do next?? Find the rest of the video here if you want to see how many I could recall from memory (I didn't even come close admittedly): https://youtu.be/Khcz16NuJuY
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: Just me and the spiders
item.description: I don't like being around people, they emotionally drain me. According to my therapist that's fine, I've got a couple people I could reach out to if I wanted. Today I signed my yearly lease for the 20th time, it's a small public housing place but me and the occasional house spiders are happy with it. Figure since it's mental health day/week/something I'd post something that positively affects my mental health.
item.dc:creator: rkingesd365

item.title: Its like, oh that's a sick Darth Maul cosplay. And he's joking with an Ahsoka cosplayer. Makes sense. Pretty funn-WOAH THOSE ARE SOME DARTH TALONS!!!

item.title: Tungsten vs. Bullet
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: Another Cake Day Dumpster
item.description:
It wasn't me that censored it!
It wasn't me who cropped out the author!
No longer just 15 years ago, but you get the idea!
Be aware the next entry may make you jump!
This is the entry that may make you jump!
Sorry about the quality. This is how I found it!
Hopefully I didn't post duplicates from other dumps I've made the previous years. I tried my best not to, but I can't remember every possible image that was posted! As always, I post the images exactly as I have saved them, so any that have removed watermarks or were of a low image quality were not my doing! I hope you all enjoy this dump and I will see you in the next one!
item.dc:creator: Shadarim
